positive: A symmetrical, detailed illustration of bioluminescent deep forest flora meeting a cosmic night sky. The central composition features winding roots and glowing, stylized mushroom clusters, set against a backdrop of nebulae and gentle, curving constellations. Use a high-contrast, linocut style mixed with vaporwave aesthetics. The primary color palette should be deep indigo, electric sapphire blue, vibrant emerald green, and accents of shimmering gold and magenta. Emphasize clean, crisp silhouettes and glowing edges. The art must be optimized for apparel printing, utilizing solid blocks of color and clear lines, evoking a sense of mystical wonder and profound tranquility. Studio lighting, graphic novel quality, hyper-detailed.
